summary: Iteration 29 — Integration Layer fully tested. 36/36 backend tests pass. All frontend integration features verified: Settings page Integrations section (super_admin only), HubSpot card with webhook URL and copy button, Agent API card with MCP endpoint URL and Generate/Rotate Key flow, More Integrations card, Sync Log section. MCP Server GET manifest and POST JSON-RPC 2.0 endpoints all working. Riley resource dashboard and admin Command Center regression both pass.

minor.issue: Returns 500: NameError: name 'RESEND_API_KEY' is not defined — PRE-EXISTING issue unrelated to integrations feature

issues: 'Request failed with status code 500' toast appears on page load — caused by pre-existing /api/reminders/status 500 error (not integration-related)

action_items: PRE-EXISTING: Fix /api/reminders/status 500 error (NameError: RESEND_API_KEY not defined) — causes toast on Settings page load
MINOR SECURITY: verify_hubspot_signature_v3() is imported in integrations.py but never called in the webhook handler — webhook currently accepts any payload without signature validation
critical_code_review_comments: integrations.py webhook receiver: verify_hubspot_signature_v3 is imported but not called — no HubSpot signature validation is performed on inbound webhooks. This is a security gap but acceptable for MVP.
hubspot.py hmac.new usage is valid Python 3 syntax and works correctly.
_get_settings() correctly pops _id from MongoDB doc and returns defaults if no doc exists.
GET /api/integrations/settings correctly masks private_app_token and api_key (returns bool, not raw values). Agent API key shows masked version (dda_XXXX••••).
MCP server correctly enforces X-Agent-Key auth on POST, allows discovery GET without auth.
All 4 MCP tools (list_projects, get_project_status, get_team_capacity, get_recent_updates) implemented and tested.
agent_api.enabled is correctly set to True upon key regeneration.

success_rate.frontend: 100% — all integration UI features verified via Playwright

seed_data_creation: None — test API calls generated some sync_log entries during HubSpot test connection tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 29 confirms Integration Layer fully working. Key test file: /app/backend/tests/test_iteration29_integrations.py (36 tests). All integration endpoints tested: GET/PUT /api/integrations/settings (super_admin only, 403 for resource), POST /api/integrations/hubspot/test (returns ok:false not 500 for invalid token), POST /api/integrations/agent-api/regenerate (returns dda_ key), GET /api/integrations/sync-logs (array, super_admin only), GET /api/mcp (no auth, 4 tools), POST /api/mcp (X-Agent-Key auth, initialize/tools-list/tools-call all work). MCP tools list_projects, get_team_capacity, get_recent_updates all return correct data. Frontend: Settings page shows Integrations section only for super_admin, Riley sees resource dashboard correctly. Pre-existing reminder 500 error unrelated to integrations.
